candidates.name: Josh Shapiro
candidates.notes: Third Jewish governor in Pennsylvania history (after Milton Shapp and Ed Rendell). Sworn in on three Hebrew Bibles including one present at Pittsburgh synagogue shooting. Trump appointed him to Council of Governors (Feb 2025) showing some bipartisan pragmatism. Was on Harris VP shortlist but faith reportedly a factor in not being chosen. Very popular in PA. Net score 2/70 — near bottom for Christian conservative scorecard.

profile.religion: Conservative Judaism (observant; sworn in on three Hebrew Bibles including one from Pittsburgh synagogue shooting bimah)
profile.birthplace: Kansas City, Missouri (raised in suburban Philadelphia)
profile.education: B.A. Political Science, University of Rochester (1995); J.D., Georgetown University Law Center (1999)
profile.background: Attorney; Pennsylvania state representative; Montgomery County commissioner; Pennsylvania Attorney General (2017-2023); became 48th governor in 2023.

candidates.name: John Fetterman
candidates.notes: Fetterman is the most politically interesting figure in this set. Heritage Action 0% means his voting record is solidly Democratic despite media narrative of 'moving right.' His rightward moves are on ISRAEL (bombing Iran, unconditional support) and TONE (voting for Trump nominees, attacking progressive purity). Still scores 0% Heritage Action and F NRA. Progressive base has turned on him — 33% approval among PA Dem primary voters. Called NRA members 'lunatic fringe.' His stroke and depression hospitalization remain factors. Wife Gisele is Brazilian immigrant activist.

profile.religion: Christian (raised Catholic; attended Episcopal and United Church of Christ services; does not foreground faith publicly)
profile.education: B.S. Finance, Albright College (1991); M.B.A., University of Connecticut (1993); M.P.P., Harvard Kennedy School (1999)
profile.background: Former Mayor of Braddock, Pennsylvania for 13 years and Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania. AmeriCorps volunteer. Known for unconventional style and work on revitalizing Braddock.

candidates.name: Dave McCormick
candidates.notes: Heritage Action 94% despite being a Wall Street/hedge fund Republican rather than a culture warrior. West Point, Bronze Star, Princeton PhD, Bridgewater CEO — one of the most credentialed senators in Congress. Wife Dina was Trump's Deputy NSA and Goldman Sachs exec. Beat 3-term incumbent Casey by razor-thin margin. His establishment pedigree and moderate cultural stances give him low scores on marriage/pch_cbg despite high Heritage Action voting record. Net worth $200M+. Total score 28/70.

profile.religion: Presbyterian (family helped establish Presbyterian Church of Newville; wife Dina is Coptic Christian)
profile.education: B.S., United States Military Academy at West Point (1987); Ph.D. International Relations, Princeton University (1996)
profile.background: Former CEO of Bridgewater Associates hedge fund. Gulf War Army veteran with Bronze Star. Under Secretary of Treasury under George W. Bush. West Point graduate.
